meta.purpose: number minimal pairs: build v_syn (mean-difference) and probe number in logit space
meta.caveat: single-token filtering selects frequent lemmas; agreement realizes number on the verb (downstream), which is the motor-band prediction

items.name: num-irreg-mouse
items.sing_prompt: Fact: I saw a single mouse. It was one mouse
items.plur_prompt: Fact: I saw several mice. They were many mice
